sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_SAM

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_d48002e2cf594f148935fb251d851cdd
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_SAM</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_SAM</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_SAM = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_SAM.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"SAM","check_name":"Now Assist for SAM Plugin Status","order":"100","check_script":"(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord(\"sys_store_app\"); gr.addQuery(\"scope\", \"sn_now_assist_sam\"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: \"Now Assist for SAM is active\", finding: \"Now Assist for SAM is active. AI-powered software asset recommendations, license optimization suggestions, and reclamation insights are available.\" }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord(\"sys_plugins\"); gr2.addQuery(\"id\", \"sn_now_assist_sam\"); gr2.addQuery(\"active\", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: \"Now Assist for SAM is active\", finding: \"Now Assist for SAM is active. AI-powered software asset recommendations, license optimization suggestions, and reclamation insights are available.\" }; } return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: \"Now Assist for SAM not found or inactive\", finding: \"Now Assist for SAM is not active. All AI-powered SAM capabilities are unavailable without this plugin.\" }; })","ai_justification":"Now Assist for SAM is the foundational plugin that enables all AI capabilities for software asset management including license optimization recommendations and reclamation insights. Without it no AI features are available regardless of data quality.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Now Assist for SAM via the ServiceNow Store. Confirm entitlement with your ServiceNow account team before activation.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SAM","check_name":"Software Model Coverage","order":"200","check_script":"(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate(\"cmdb_sam_sw_install\"); gaTotal.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: \"No software install records found\", finding: \"No software install records found. Now Assist SAM has no data to analyze for license optimization or reclamation recommendations.\" }; } var gaModel = new GlideAggregate(\"cmdb_sam_sw_install\"); gaModel.addQuery(\"software_model\", \"!=\", \"\"); gaModel.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaModel.query(); var withModel = gaModel.next() ? parseInt(gaModel.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withModel / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + \"% of software installs have a model (\" + withModel + \"/\" + total + \")\"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + \"% of software installs are linked to a software model. Now Assist SAM has strong structured data for AI-powered license analysis and optimization.\" }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: \"needs_attention\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of software installs have a software model (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations will have reduced accuracy without complete model coverage.\" }; } else { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of software installs have a software model. Insufficient structured data for meaningful Now Assist SAM AI license optimization recommendations.\" }; } })","ai_justification":"Software models are the structured foundation that Now Assist SAM uses for AI license analysis and optimization. Without model coverage, AI cannot identify license waste, reclamation candidates, or optimization opportunities across the software estate.","remediation_guidance":"Normalize software installs against the ServiceNow software model library. Use the SAM Normalization workspace to identify and map unrecognized software. Target: 80%+ model coverage.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SAM","check_name":"License Reconciliation Coverage","order":"300","check_script":"(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate(\"alm_license\"); gaTotal.addQuery(\"active\", true); gaTotal.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: \"No active license entitlement records found\", finding: \"No active license entitlement records found. Now Assist SAM cannot perform AI license position analysis without entitlement data.\" }; } var gaRights = new GlideAggregate(\"alm_license\"); gaRights.addQuery(\"active\", true); gaRights.addQuery(\"rights\", \">\", \"0\"); gaRights.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaRights.query(); var withRights = gaRights.next() ? parseInt(gaRights.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withRights / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + \"% of active licenses have entitlement quantities (\" + withRights + \"/\" + total + \")\"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + \"% of active licenses have entitlement quantities populated. Now Assist SAM can perform accurate AI license position analysis.\" }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: \"needs_attention\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of active licenses have entitlement quantities (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI license position analysis will be incomplete.\" }; } else { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of active licenses have entitlement quantities. Now Assist SAM cannot perform meaningful AI license position analysis without entitlement data.\" }; } })","ai_justification":"License entitlement quantities are the baseline data Now Assist SAM uses to calculate license position and generate AI optimization recommendations. Without entitlement data, AI cannot determine over-licensing, under-licensing, or reclamation opportunities.","remediation_guidance":"Populate the rights/entitlement quantity field on all active license records. Import license entitlement data from publisher contracts or procurement records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses to update.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SAM","check_name":"Active License Entitlements","order":"400","check_script":"(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate(\"alm_license\"); ga.addQuery(\"active\", true); ga.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; if (count >= 50) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: count + \" active license entitlement records\", finding: count + \" active license records. Now Assist SAM has sufficient entitlement data for AI-powered license optimization analysis.\" }; } else if (count >= 10) { return { status: \"needs_attention\", actualValue: count + \" active license entitlement records\", finding: \"Only \" + count + \" active license records (target: 50+). Now Assist SAM AI analysis will have limited coverage across the software estate.\" }; } else { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: count + \" active license entitlement records\", finding: \"Only \" + count + \" active license records. Insufficient entitlement data for meaningful Now Assist SAM AI license optimization recommendations.\" }; } })","ai_justification":"License entitlement records are the core dataset Now Assist SAM analyzes for AI optimization recommendations. Without sufficient entitlements, AI has no basis for identifying over-licensing, compliance risks, or cost reduction opportunities.","remediation_guidance":"Import software license entitlements from publisher contracts and procurement records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses > New to create entitlement records for all managed software titles.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SAM","check_name":"Publisher Coverage on Installs","order":"500","check_script":"(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate(\"cmdb_sam_sw_install\"); gaTotal.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: \"No software install records found\", finding: \"No software install records found. Publisher coverage cannot be assessed.\" }; } var gaPub = new GlideAggregate(\"cmdb_sam_sw_install\"); gaPub.addQuery(\"manufacturer\", \"!=\", \"\"); gaPub.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaPub.query(); var withPub = gaPub.next() ? parseInt(gaPub.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withPub / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + \"% of installs have a publisher (\" + withPub + \"/\" + total + \")\"; if (pct >= 85) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + \"% of software installs have a publisher. Now Assist SAM can group and analyze license obligations by publisher for AI optimization recommendations.\" }; } else if (pct >= 60) { return { status: \"needs_attention\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of installs have a publisher (target: 85%+). Now Assist SAM publisher-level AI analysis will have incomplete coverage.\" }; } else { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of installs have a publisher. Now Assist SAM cannot perform meaningful publisher-level AI license analysis without publisher data.\" }; } })","ai_justification":"Publisher data enables Now Assist SAM to group license obligations by vendor for AI-powered spend analysis and optimization recommendations. Without publisher coverage, AI cannot identify publisher-level consolidation or renegotiation opportunities.","remediation_guidance":"Normalize software installs against the SAM content library to auto-populate publisher data. Use the Normalization workspace to identify installs missing publisher information.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SAM","check_name":"SAM Publisher Distinct Count","order":"600","check_script":"(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate(\"alm_license\"); gaTotal.addQuery(\"active\", true); gaTotal.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: \"No active license records found\", finding: \"No active license records. Publisher coverage cannot be assessed.\" }; } var gaPub = new GlideAggregate(\"alm_license\"); gaPub.addQuery(\"active\", true); gaPub.addQuery(\"manufacturer\", \"!=\", \"\"); gaPub.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaPub.query(); var withPub = gaPub.next() ? parseInt(gaPub.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withPub / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + \"% of active licenses have a publisher (\" + withPub + \"/\" + total + \")\"; if (pct >= 85) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + \"% of active licenses have publisher data. Now Assist SAM has structured publisher information for AI-powered spend analysis and optimization.\" }; } else if (pct >= 60) { return { status: \"needs_attention\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of active licenses have publisher data (target: 85%+). Now Assist SAM publisher-level AI analysis will be incomplete.\" }; } else { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of licenses have publisher data. Now Assist SAM cannot perform meaningful publisher-level AI license analysis.\" }; } })","ai_justification":"Publisher data on license records enables Now Assist SAM to identify publisher-level spend patterns, consolidation opportunities, and renegotiation candidates. Without it, AI recommendations are limited to individual title analysis rather than strategic publisher-level insights.","remediation_guidance":"Populate the manufacturer/publisher field on all active license records. This data is critical for Now Assist SAM to generate publisher-level AI spend analysis and optimization recommendations.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SAM","check_name":"License Ownership Configuration","order":"700","check_script":"(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate(\"alm_license\"); gaTotal.addQuery(\"active\", true); gaTotal.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: \"not_applicable\", actualValue: \"No active license records found\", finding: \"No active license records. License ownership cannot be assessed.\" }; } var gaOwned = new GlideAggregate(\"alm_license\"); gaOwned.addQuery(\"active\", true); gaOwned.addEncodedQuery(\"owned_byISNOTEMPTY^ORmanaged_byISNOTEMPTY^ORassigned_toISNOTEMPTY\"); gaOwned.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaOwned.query(); var withOwner = gaOwned.next() ? parseInt(gaOwned.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withOwner / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + \"% of active licenses have an owner/manager (\" + withOwner + \"/\" + total + \")\"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + \"% of active licenses have ownership assigned. Now Assist SAM AI reclamation and optimization recommendations can be routed to the correct license owners.\" }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: \"needs_attention\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of active licenses have ownership assigned (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations may not reach the correct stakeholders.\" }; } else { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of licenses have ownership assigned. Now Assist SAM AI recommendations cannot be routed without license ownership data.\" }; } })","ai_justification":"License ownership data enables Now Assist SAM to route AI-generated optimization recommendations and reclamation tasks to the correct stakeholders. Without ownership, AI insights are generated but cannot be acted upon by the right people.","remediation_guidance":"Assign owners, managers, or responsible parties to all active license records. Navigate to Software Asset Management > Licenses and populate the Owned By, Managed By, or Assigned To fields.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SAM","check_name":"SAM Workspace Activation","order":"800","check_script":"(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord(\"sys_store_app\"); gr.addQuery(\"scope\", \"sn_sam_workspace\"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: \"Software Asset Workspace is active\", finding: \"Software Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist SAM AI insights including license recommendations and reclamation suggestions are surfaced in context for SAM analysts.\" }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord(\"sys_plugins\"); gr2.addQuery(\"id\", \"sn_sam_ws\"); gr2.addQuery(\"active\", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: \"Software Asset Workspace is active\", finding: \"Software Asset Workspace is active. Now Assist SAM AI insights are surfaced in context for SAM analysts.\" }; } return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: \"Software Asset Workspace not found or inactive\", finding: \"Software Asset Workspace is not active. Now Assist SAM AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface for SAM analysts.\" }; })","ai_justification":"Software Asset Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist SAM AI insights are presented to analysts. Without it, AI-generated license recommendations and reclamation suggestions are produced but never surfaced where SAM analysts work.","remediation_guidance":"Activate the Software Asset Workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist SAM AI insights to surface in context for software asset analysts.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SAM","check_name":"SAM Customization Risk","order":"900","check_script":"(function() { var gaBR = new GlideAggregate(\"sys_script\"); gaBR.addQuery(\"collection\", \"cmdb_sam_sw_install\"); gaBR.addQuery(\"active\", true); gaBR.addQuery(\"sys_created_by\", \"NOT IN\", \"glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy\"); gaBR.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaBR.query(); var brs1 = gaBR.next() ? parseInt(gaBR.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; var gaBR2 = new GlideAggregate(\"sys_script\"); gaBR2.addQuery(\"collection\", \"alm_license\"); gaBR2.addQuery(\"active\", true); gaBR2.addQuery(\"sys_created_by\", \"NOT IN\", \"glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy\"); gaBR2.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaBR2.query(); var brs2 = gaBR2.next() ? parseInt(gaBR2.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; var risk = brs1 + brs2; var actualValue = brs1 + \" custom BRs on cmdb_sam_sw_install + \" + brs2 + \" on alm_license (risk score: \" + risk + \")\"; if (risk <= 5) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Low SAM customization risk (score: \" + risk + \"). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations are unlikely to encounter conflicts with existing customizations.\" }; } else if (risk <= 10) { return { status: \"needs_attention\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Moderate SAM customization risk (score: \" + risk + \"). Test Now Assist SAM in sub-production before enabling in production.\" }; } else { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"High SAM customization risk (score: \" + risk + \"). Extensive customization increases the risk of conflicts with Now Assist SAM AI recommendations.\" }; } })","ai_justification":"Custom Business Rules on SAM tables can intercept or conflict with Now Assist SAM AI actions and recommendations. High customization density increases the risk of AI recommendations failing or producing unexpected results.","remediation_guidance":"Review custom Business Rules on cmdb_sam_sw_install and alm_license tables. Test Now Assist SAM in a sub-production environment to identify and resolve conflicts before enabling in production.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"SAM","check_name":"Discovery Integration for SAM","order":"1000","check_script":"(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate(\"cmdb_sam_sw_install\"); gaTotal.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: \"No software install records found\", finding: \"No software install records found. Discovery integration cannot be assessed.\" }; } var gaDisc = new GlideAggregate(\"cmdb_sam_sw_install\"); gaDisc.addQuery(\"discovery_source\", \"!=\", \"\"); gaDisc.addAggregate(\"COUNT\"); gaDisc.query(); var withDisc = gaDisc.next() ? parseInt(gaDisc.getAggregate(\"COUNT\")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withDisc / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + \"% of installs have a discovery source (\" + withDisc + \"/\" + total + \")\"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: \"ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + \"% of software installs have a discovery source. Now Assist SAM AI analysis is based on accurate, automatically discovered software data.\" }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: \"needs_attention\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of installs have a discovery source (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations may be based on incomplete or manually entered data.\" }; } else { return { status: \"not_ready\", actualValue: actualValue, finding: \"Only \" + pct + \"% of installs have a discovery source. Now Assist SAM AI recommendations cannot be trusted without automated discovery feeding accurate install data.\" }; } })","ai_justification":"Discovery-sourced install data ensures Now Assist SAM AI analysis is based on accurate, current software inventory. Without automated discovery, AI recommendations are based on potentially stale or incomplete manual data, reducing the reliability of license optimization suggestions.","remediation_guidance":"Configure ServiceNow Discovery or an integrated discovery tool to automatically populate software install records. Manual install data is unreliable for AI analysis. Navigate to Discovery > Administration to configure software discovery.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_SAM'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:17:02</sys_created_on><sys_id>d48002e2cf594f148935fb251d851cdd</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_SAM</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_d48002e2cf594f148935fb251d851cdd</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
